  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "Should “clean this up” be limited to sentence-level copyediting only (grammar, concision, tone) without changing claims or structure (A), or should it also include light section-level reorganization and moderating/hedging strong novelty claims where phrasing overreaches (B)? Please reply A or B.",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.6": "The request most directly implies sentence-level polishing to improve clarity, concision, and tone.",
    "RX.1": "Edits should preserve or appropriately signal uncertainty rather than introduce unwarranted certainty.",
    "RX.2": "The text contains strong 'first' claims, so cleanup must avoid introducing or reinforcing overclaims.",
    "RX.3": "Work must stay within the scope of 'cleanup' and avoid introducing new content or analyses.",
    "RX.4": "Edits should not create misleading statements that could lead to harmful interpretations or actions.",
    "RX.5": "Edits must maintain traceability to the original meanings and avoid altering technical intent."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: Should “clean this up” be limited to sentence-level copyediting only (grammar, concision, tone) without changing claims or structure (A), or should it also include light section-level reorganization and moderating/hedging strong novelty claims where phrasing overreaches (B)? Please reply A or B.

rationale.R1.6: The request most directly implies sentence-level polishing to improve clarity, concision, and tone.
rationale.RX.1: Edits should preserve or appropriately signal uncertainty rather than introduce unwarranted certainty.
rationale.RX.2: The text contains strong 'first' claims, so cleanup must avoid introducing or reinforcing overclaims.
rationale.RX.3: Work must stay within the scope of 'cleanup' and avoid introducing new content or analyses.
rationale.RX.4: Edits should not create misleading statements that could lead to harmful interpretations or actions.
rationale.RX.5: Edits must maintain traceability to the original meanings and avoid altering technical intent.
